tool_input.description: Read FTS hints file for BM25 term lookup

tool_input.command: bash scripts/bm25-search.sh universal-dao 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(d['file'], d['section_id'], d['section_title'], d['score']) for d in data[:20]]"
tool_input.description: Search for universal-dao term and show top results
